desc: A frost-bound gunslinger who freezes enemies in their tracks. Carlotta dual-wields pistols that fire shards of absolute zero, each shot crystallizing the air itself. Cold, precise, and utterly relentless.

skills.d: Fire up to 6 rapid pistol shots dealing Glacio DMG. Every 3rd shot applies Frostbite, slowing the enemy.
Unload a barrage of ice-imbued bullets in a cone, dealing Glacio DMG. Enemies with Frostbite take 30% increased DMG. CD: 12s.
Fire a massive cryo-blast that freezes all enemies in its path, dealing massive Glacio DMG. Frozen enemies have Glacio RES reduced by 15% for 10s. CD: 24s. Energy Cost: 150.
Critical hits on Frostbitten enemies generate Frost Marks. At 5 marks, the next Resonance Skill has its CD reduced by 50%.
Deal Glacio DMG. Increase incoming Resonator Glacio DMG by 23% and CRIT Rate by 10% for 14s.
